LIGHTNING_WAND - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.ModItems
Lightning Wand.
LightningWandItem - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom
Represents a magical wand that summons lightning at a targeted location.

Constructs a new LightningWandItem with the given properties.
